flags.message: Cell mode is 'forward' but the provisioned snapshot's only docket entry (2025-02-24, 'Case termination for opinion') and its populated opinion-cluster link show the appeal was decided ~16 months before this run. I treated the cell as a de facto replay: predicted from the pre-decision record only and did not retrieve the CA10 opinion, disposition, or decision coverage. Consider re-provisioning this cell as replay with a DECIDED_BEFORE clock.

Incidental near-leak disclosure: while pulling the underlying district docket (D. Kan. 2:21-cv-02166, pre-decision record), the entries list showed three post-appeal-decision entries exist (Apr/Jul/Oct 2025) with blank descriptions. Dates alone are ambiguous between mandate/costs and remand activity; I did not open them and did not use them as signal. I have no reliable prior knowledge of this appeal's outcome.

The configured CourtListener MCP server never connected in this cell (no tools discoverable), so harness-side retrieval_log.json will not reflect my CourtListener usage. I fell back to the CourtListener REST API v4 with the provisioned token and hand-logged every call in retrieval.md.
